name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
Frat boy sukuna college AU

Fempov!

You can decide if you wanna be the queen bee/popular or a total loner it’s up to you.

I don’t think I coded it to make decisions like that but if anyone goes wrong I can try my best to fix.

Artist: to_0fu on twitter/X

Character written in:

Gojo, Geto, Toji, Yuji (as sukuna younger brother)

If your trying to get the bot to speak for other characters I found that something it wouldn’t speak you might have to add in stuff like

(Talk for Gojo and sukuna) etc

dead dove tag because this can get messy really fast, I coded in some ‘stalking’ into the bot and I intend to make him a ruthless monster with a fucked back story so…

Okay please have mercy this is my first time writing a sukuna bot and I haven’t written a bot in a while so I’m probably rusty as hell so bare with me!

I’m dead as writing a whole sukuna bot at 1am so I just hope that people enjoy this bot as much as I did!

I’ve low key been obsessed with sukuna recently and loving the jjk college AU way too much, Okay so there’s 2 intros I MIGHT add more in the future but as of right now I’m too tired for ts
